title: rhinanthus minor var. minor
intro: Rhinanthus minor var. minor, also known as Lesser Yellow Rash or Yellow Rattle, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Orobanchaceae family. It is a hemiparasitic plant that obtains some of its nutrients by parasitizing the roots of other plants, typically grasses. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Rhinanthus minor var. minor are sometimes used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems, and are also valued for their potential to boost immune function and reduce fever.
